title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Tarragon essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because it possesses potent anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract. The oil's bioactive compounds, such as limonene and estragole, work synergistically to soothe irritated tissues, alleviate symptoms like abdominal pain and diarrhea, and promote healing of damaged mucous membranes. Additionally, tarragon essential oils may also modulate the immune response, helping to reduce inflammation...
